rag_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts by tracing root causes and removing invalid clauses rather than adding architecture.
generic_rules: AGREE assumptions and guarantees must reference component ports only within valid component type scopes.
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Subcomponent ports should not be used in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex when writing AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE type errors; instead, fix root unresolved references or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
